schedules_text:
Gate A at (2,8): open exactly when (t mod 2) is in {1}. So it is open at t=1,3,... and closed at t=0,2,... You can only step ONTO it at a tick t+1 where it is open.
Guard P: walks a fixed cycle of length 4. Its position at tick t is determined by (t mod 4) as follows: t mod 4=0: (6,4); t mod 4=1: (7,4); t mod 4=2: (7,3); t mod 4=3: (7,4). This repeats forever.
Guard Q: walks a fixed cycle of length 8. Its position at tick t is determined by (t mod 8) as follows: t mod 8=0: (1,2); t mod 8=1: (2,2); t mod 8=2: (2,1); t mod 8=3: (3,1); t mod 8=4: (3,2); t mod 8=5: (3,1); t mod 8=6: (2,1); t mod 8=7: (2,2). This repeats forever.
parcels_text:
Parcel 1: pick it up at (7,4) (map glyph '1'), deliver it to (5,2) (map glyph 'x'). Pickup and delivery happen automatically when you end a tick on the cell.
Parcel 2: pick it up at (7,3) (map glyph '2'), deliver it to (5,3) (map glyph 'y'). Pickup and delivery happen automatically when you end a tick on the cell.
